# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
  agent any

  options {
    timestamps()
    disableConcurrentBuilds()
    buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30', artifactNumToKeepStr: '10'))
    timeout(time: 90, unit: 'MINUTES')
    ansiColor('xterm')
  }

  parameters {
    choice(name: 'ARTIFACT_TYPE', choices: ['single', 'zip', 'tar.gz', 'tgz', 'tar'], description: 'Artifact packaging type')
    text(name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS', defaultValue: '', description: 'One URL per line. Supports http(s)://, s3://bucket/key, artifactory://repo/path (mapped via ARTIFACTORY_BASE_URL).')
    string(name: 'ARTIFACT_NAME', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional. If empty, derived from URL filename.')
    string(name: 'ARTIFACTORY_BASE_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'Required if using artifactory:// URLs, e.g. https://artifactory.company.com/artifactory')
    string(name: 'DEPLOY_TARGETS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma-separated list of production servers (hostnames or IPs)')
    string(name: 'DEPLOY_USER', defaultValue: 'deploy', description: 'SSH user for deployment')
    string(name: 'DEPLOY_PATH', defaultValue: '/opt/app', description: 'Remote deploy directory')
    booleanParam(name: 'RESTART_SERVICE', defaultValue: true, description: 'Restart service after deploy')
    string(name: 'SERVICE_NAME', defaultValue: 'app', description: 'Service name to restart (systemd)')
    booleanParam(name: 'RUN_HEALTHCHECK', defaultValue: true, description: 'Run healthcheck after deploy')
    string(name: 'HEALTHCHECK_URL', defaultValue: 'http://localhost:8080/health', description: 'Healthcheck URL on target host')
    booleanParam(name: 'DRY_RUN', defaultValue: false, description: 'If true, do not modify remote servers')
    booleanParam(name: 'REQUIRE_APPROVAL', defaultValue: true, description: 'Require manual approval before production deploy')
    string(name: 'APPROVERS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional. Comma-separated Jenkins usernames allowed to approve')
    credentials(name: 'SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID', defaultValue: '', description: 'SSH private key credentials for production servers')
    credentials(name: 'HTTP_CREDENTIALS_ID', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional. Username/password for HTTP(S) downloads (basic auth)')
    credentials(name: 'ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional. Username/password for Artifactory downloads')
    credentials(name: 'AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional. AWS credentials for s3:// downloads')
    string(name: 'AWS_REGION', defaultValue: 'us-east-1', description: 'AWS region for S3 downloads')
    booleanParam(name: 'VERIFY_SHA256', defaultValue: false, description: 'Verify SHA256 checksums')
    text(name: 'SHA256_SUMS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional. One per line: "<sha256> <filename>"')
    booleanParam(name: 'KEEP_WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS', defaultValue: false, description: 'Keep downloaded artifacts in workspace after deploy')
  }

  environment {
    WORK_DIR = "${env.WORKSPACE}/_deploy_work"
    DL_DIR   = "${env.WORKSPACE}/_deploy_work/downloads"
    PKG_DIR  = "${env.WORKSPACE}/_deploy_work/packages"
    STAGE_DIR= "${env.WORKSPACE}/_deploy_work/stage"
  }

  stages {
    stage('Validate Inputs') {
      steps {
        script {
          def urls = (params.ARTIFACT_URLS ?: '').split(/\r?\n/).collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
          if (urls.isEmpty()) error("ARTIFACT_URLS is required (one URL per line).")
          def targets = (params.DEPLOY_TARGETS ?: '').split(/\s*,\s*/).collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
          if (targets.isEmpty()) error("DEPLOY_TARGETS is required (comma-separated).")
          if (!params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()) error("SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID is required.")
          if (params.ARTIFACT_TYPE in ['zip','tar.gz','tgz','tar'] && urls.size() > 1) {
            error("When ARTIFACT_TYPE is an archive, provide exactly one URL (got ${urls.size()}).")
          }
          if (urls.any { it.startsWith('artifactory://') } && !params.ARTIFACTORY_BASE_URL?.trim()) {
            error("ARTIFACTORY_BASE_URL is required when using artifactory:// URLs.")
          }
          if (params.VERIFY_SHA256 && !(params.SHA256_SUMS ?: '').trim()) {
            error("VERIFY_SHA256 is true but SHA256_SUMS is empty.")
          }
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Prepare Workspace') {
      steps {
        sh """
          set -euo pipefail
          rm -rf '${WORK_DIR}'
          mkdir -p '${DL_DIR}' '${PKG_DIR}' '${STAGE_DIR}'
        """
      }
    }

    stage('Download Artifacts') {
      steps {
        script {
          def urls = (params.ARTIFACT_URLS ?: '').split(/\r?\n/).collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }

          def httpCred = params.HTTP_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()
          def artCred  = params.ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()
          def awsCred  = params.AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()

          def bindings = []
          if (httpCred) bindings << usernamePassword(credentialsId: httpCred, usernameVariable: 'HTTP_USER', passwordVariable: 'HTTP_PASS')
          if (artCred)  bindings << usernamePassword(credentialsId: artCred,  usernameVariable: 'ART_USER',  passwordVariable: 'ART_PASS')
          if (awsCred)  bindings << [$class: 'AmazonWebServicesCredentialsBinding', credentialsId: awsCred, accessKeyVariable: 'AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID', secretKeyVariable: 'AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY']

          def doDownload = {
            urls.eachWithIndex { u, idx ->
              def resolvedUrl = u
              if (u.startsWith('artifactory://')) {
                def path = u - 'artifactory://'
                resolvedUrl = "${params.ARTIFACTORY_BASE_URL.replaceAll('/+\$','')}/${path}".toString()
              }

              def name = params.ARTIFACT_NAME?.trim()
              if (!name) {
                def base = resolvedUrl.tokenize('/').last()
                name = base ? base : "artifact_${idx}"
              }
              def out = "${env.DL_DIR}/${idx}_${name}".toString()

              if (u.startsWith('s3://')) {
                sh """
                  set -euo pipefail
                  command -v aws >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "aws CLI not found on agent"; exit 2; }
                  export AWS_REGION='${params.AWS_REGION}'
                  aws s3 cp '${u}' '${out}'
                """
              } else if (resolvedUrl.startsWith('http://') || resolvedUrl.startsWith('https://')) {
                def authPart = ""
                if (u.startsWith('artifactory://') && artCred) {
                  authPart = "-u \"${'$'}ART_USER:${'$'}ART_PASS\""
                } else if (httpCred) {
                  authPart = "-u \"${'$'}HTTP_USER:${'$'}HTTP_PASS\""
                }
                sh """
                  set -euo pipefail
                  curl -fL --retry 5 --retry-delay 2 ${authPart} -o '${out}' '${resolvedUrl}'
                """
              } else {
                error("Unsupported URL scheme: ${u}")
              }
            }
          }

          if (bindings) {
            withCredentials(bindings) { doDownload() }
          } else {
            doDownload()
          }
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Verify Checksums') {
      when { expression { return params.VERIFY_SHA256 } }
      steps {
        sh """
          set -euo pipefail
          cd '${DL_DIR}'
          cat > sha256sums.txt <<'EOF'
${params.SHA256_SUMS}
EOF
          sha256sum -c sha256sums.txt
        """
      }
    }

    stage('Package for Deployment') {
      steps {
        script {
          def files = sh(script: "ls -1 '${env.DL_DIR}'", returnStdout: true).trim().split('\n').findAll { it }
          if (files.isEmpty()) error("No downloaded artifacts found.")

          if (params.ARTIFACT_TYPE == 'single') {
            sh """
              set -euo pipefail
              cd '${DL_DIR}'
              tar -czf '${PKG_DIR}/payload.tgz' *
            """
          } else {
            def f = files[0]
            def src = "${env.DL_DIR}/${f}".toString()
            sh "cp -f '${src}' '${PKG_DIR}/payload.${params.ARTIFACT_TYPE == 'zip' ? 'zip' : 'tar'}'"
            if (params.ARTIFACT_TYPE == 'zip') {
              sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                rm -rf '${STAGE_DIR}/unpacked'
                mkdir -p '${STAGE_DIR}/unpacked'
                unzip -q '${PKG_DIR}/payload.zip' -d '${STAGE_DIR}/unpacked'
                cd '${STAGE_DIR}/unpacked'
                tar -czf '${PKG_DIR}/payload.tgz' .
              """
            } else if (params.ARTIFACT_TYPE in ['tar.gz','tgz']) {
              sh "cp -f '${src}' '${PKG_DIR}/payload.tgz'"
            } else if (params.ARTIFACT_TYPE == 'tar') {
              sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                rm -rf '${STAGE_DIR}/unpacked'
                mkdir -p '${STAGE_DIR}/unpacked'
                tar -xf '${PKG_DIR}/payload.tar' -C '${STAGE_DIR}/unpacked'
                cd '${STAGE_DIR}/unpacked'
                tar -czf '${PKG_DIR}/payload.tgz' .
              """
            } else {
              error("Unsupported ARTIFACT_TYPE: ${params.ARTIFACT_TYPE}")
            }
          }

          sh """
            set -euo pipefail
            ls -lh '${PKG_DIR}/payload.tgz'
          """
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Approval') {
      when { expression { return params.REQUIRE_APPROVAL } }
      steps {
        script {
          def msg = "Approve production deployment to: ${params.DEPLOY_TARGETS}\nArtifacts:\n${params.ARTIFACT_URLS}"
          def submitter = (params.APPROVERS ?: '').split(/\s*,\s*/).collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }.join(',')
          if (submitter) {
            input message: msg, ok: 'Deploy', submitter: submitter
          } else {
            input message: msg, ok: 'Deploy'
          }
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Deploy to Production') {
      steps {
        script {
          def targets = (params.DEPLOY_TARGETS ?: '').split(/\s*,\s*/).collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
          def remotePath = params.DEPLOY_PATH.trim()
          def user = params.DEPLOY_USER.trim()

          def deployOne = { host ->
            sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
              sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                PKG='${PKG_DIR}/payload.tgz'
                REMOTE='${user}@${host}'
                TS=\$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)
                RELEASE_DIR='${remotePath}/releases/'"\$TS"
                CURRENT_LINK='${remotePath}/current'
                SHARED_DIR='${remotePath}/shared'
                UPLOAD_PATH='/tmp/payload_'"\$TS"'.tgz'

                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no "\$REMOTE" "mkdir -p '${remotePath}' '${remotePath}/releases' '\$SHARED_DIR'"

                if [ '${params.DRY_RUN}' = 'true' ]; then
                  echo "DRY_RUN: would upload \$PKG to \$REMOTE:\$UPLOAD_PATH"
                else
                  scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no "\$PKG" "\$REMOTE:\$UPLOAD_PATH"
                fi

                if [ '${params.DRY_RUN}' = 'true' ]; then
                  echo "DRY_RUN: would extract to \$RELEASE_DIR and update symlink \$CURRENT_LINK"
                else
                  ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no "\$REMOTE" "
                    set -euo pipefail
                    mkdir -p '\$RELEASE_DIR'
                    tar -xzf '\$UPLOAD_PATH' -C '\$RELEASE_DIR'
                    rm -f '\$UPLOAD_PATH'
                    ln -sfn '\$RELEASE_DIR' '\$CURRENT_LINK'
                  "
                fi

                if [ '${params.RESTART_SERVICE}' = 'true' ]; then
                  if [ '${params.DRY_RUN}' = 'true' ]; then
                    echo "DRY_RUN: would restart service '${params.SERVICE_NAME}' on ${host}"
                  else
                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no "\$REMOTE" "sudo systemctl restart '${params.SERVICE_NAME}'"
                  fi
                fi

                if [ '${params.RUN_HEALTHCHECK}' = 'true' ]; then
                  if [ '${params.DRY_RUN}' = 'true' ]; then
                    echo "DRY_RUN: would run healthcheck '${params.HEALTHCHECK_URL}' on ${host}"
                  else
                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no "\$REMOTE" "
                      set -euo pipefail
                      for i in \$(seq 1 30); do
                        if curl -fsS '${params.HEALTHCHECK_URL}' >/dev/null; then
                          exit 0
                        fi
                        sleep 2
                      done
                      echo 'Healthcheck failed'
                      exit 1
                    "
                  fi
                fi

                if [ '${params.DRY_RUN}' != 'true' ]; then
                  ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no "\$REMOTE" "
                    set -euo pipefail
                    cd '${remotePath}/releases'
                    ls -1dt */ 2>/dev/null | tail -n +6 | xargs -r rm -rf
                  "
                fi
              """
            }
          }

          def branches = [:]
          targets.each { h ->
            def host = h
            branches["deploy_${host}"] = { deployOne(host) }
          }
          parallel branches
        }
      }
    }
  }

  post {
    always {
      script {
        if (!params.KEEP_WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS) {
          sh "rm -rf '${WORK_DIR}' || true"
        }
      }
    }
    success {
      echo "Deployment completed."
    }
    failure {
      echo "Deployment failed."
    }
  }
}
